data.title: Express Wash Concepts opens 37th Moo Moo Express Car Wash in Columbus at 5925 Sawmill Road, offering free washes for ten days.
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio on July 24, 2025, Express Wash Concepts (EWC) revealed their ongoing growth in Central Ohio by inaugurating the latest Moo Moo Express Car Wash at 5925 Sawmill Road in Columbus. This expansion bolsters EWC's regional influence, now boasting a total of 37 locations in the area.

data.title: Tivoli Lighting introduces new Mekos and Reveal chandeliers to Inspire Series, along with Array and Eos fixtures, powered by Flexile light engine for uniform illumination.
data.description: In Southern California, Tivoli Lighting, a renowned company with over 50 years of experience in linear lighting, has unveiled two new additions to its Inspire Series – Mekos and Reveal chandeliers, joining the Array and Eos fixtures. These chandeliers are powered by Tivoli’s Flexile light engine, ensuring consistent lighting across various lengths to replicate the classic radiance of traditional 360° neon lighting. The Inspire Series chandeliers are customizable for different settings, providing users with versatile options.

data.title: RH opens RH Montreal: Gallery at Royalmount, featuring luxury furnishings, art, antiques. Includes a glass-encased Rooftop Restaurant & Park.
data.description: RH (NYSE: RH) has launched RH Montreal, The Gallery at Royalmount in Quebec, its first Design Gallery in the region. This immersive retail space combines luxury home furnishings from RH Interiors, Modern, and Outdoor, along with rare art, antiques, and artifacts. The gallery also includes a Rooftop Restaurant & Park enclosed in glass, offering a curated menu. RH Montreal aims to provide a unique shopping experience for customers, showcasing a blend of global treasures and timeless pieces.

data.title: Energy Fuels to hold Q2-2025 earnings call on August 7th at 9 AM MT. Leader in US uranium production. Stock symbols: UUUU, EFR.
data.description: Energy Fuels Inc., a prominent U.S. producer of uranium, rare earth elements, and critical minerals, will conduct a conference call and webcast at 9:00 AM MT on Thursday, August 7, 2025. The call will take place in Denver and will be accessible to the public. Energy Fuels Inc. is listed on the NYSE American as UUUU and on the TSX as EFR. This company is known for being a major player in the industry. The announcement was made on July 24, 2025.

data.title: TransUnion exceeds Q2 expectations with revenue up 10% Y/Y to $1.14B, EPS at $1.08. Strong growth in US and international markets.
data.description: TransUnion, a credit reporting agency listed on NYSE as TRU, had a successful second quarter of 2025, surpassing analyst predictions. Their revenue rose by 10% year-over-year to $1.14 billion, and their adjusted earnings per share stood at $1.08. This growth was fueled by a significant uptick in the U.S. and international markets, with impressive advancements seen in U.S. Financial Services and rapid expansion in regions like India, Canada, and Africa. The company has now revised its full-year 2025 guidance upwards, showing strong confidence in their future performance despite ongoing market challenges.

data.title: NextEra Energy board approves $0.5665 quarterly dividend per share, payable on Sept. 15, 2025, to shareholders on record by Aug. 28.
data.description: In Juno Beach, Florida on July 24, 2025, NextEra Energy, Inc.'s (NYSE: NEE) board of directors announced a quarterly common stock dividend of $0.5665 per share. The dividend will be distributed on Sept. 15, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of Aug. 28, 2025.
